description: Redeem a viewing grant to access a private attestation with watermarking and session-scoped re-encryption.

main.description: Redeem a viewing grant. Decrypts the private attestation, watermarks it, re-encrypts with a session key, and returns the payload.

errors.name: NotFound
errors.description: Viewing grant or attestation not found.

errors.name: GrantRevoked
errors.description: The viewing grant has been revoked.

grantId.description: The viewing grant ID to redeem.

sessionEncryptedPayload.description: Object with ciphertext, iv, and authTag (base64 strings).

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the session expires.

watermarkId.description: Unique identifier embedded in the watermarked data.
